zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir William Boleyn於1451年出生在英國諾福爾可布利可林時，他的父親Sir Geoffrey Boleyn II45歲，母親Anne Elizabeth Hoo4歲。他於1475年與Lady Margaret Butler在英國諾福爾可布利可林結婚。他們至少是8個兒子和5個女兒的父母。他於1500年在英國被列為high sheriff of norfolk and suffolk。他去世於1505年10月10日在英國肯特維享年54歲，埋葬在英國諾福爾可諾維其諾維其 凱德拉爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir William Boleyn于1451年出生在英国諾福爾可布利可林时，他的父亲Sir Geoffrey Boleyn II45岁，母亲Anne Elizabeth Hoo4岁。他于1475年与Lady Margaret Butler在英国諾福爾可布利可林结婚。他们至少是8个儿子和5个女儿的父母。他于1500年在英国被列为high sheriff of norfolk and suffolk。他去世于1505年10月10日在英国肯特維享年54岁，埋葬在英国諾福爾可諾維其諾維其 凱德拉爾。

nameMeanings.name: Boleyn
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (of Norman origin): variant of   Bullen  .
Flemish: derivative of the personal name Bol, from Baldwin .

variants.name: Bullen
meanings: English (of Norman origin): habitational name from the French Channel port of Boulogne, recorded in Latin sources both as Gessoriacum and as Bononia. The latter name is clearly the source of the modern placename. It is ostensibly a derivative of Latin bonus ‘good’ (compare Bolognese ), but may in fact come from a Gaulish element bona ‘foundation’. Boulogne has long been a major trading port between England and France.

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir William Boleyn was born in 1451, in Blickling, Norfolk, England, his father, Sir Geoffrey Boleyn II, was 45 and his mother, Anne Elizabeth Hoo, was 4. He married Lady Margaret Butler in 1475, in Blickling, Norfolk, England. They were the parents of at least 8 sons and 5 daughters. In 1500, at the age of 49, his occupation is listed as high sheriff of norfolk and suffolk in England. He died on 10 October 1505, in Hever, Kent, England, at the age of 54, and was buried in Norwich Cathedral, Norwich, Norfolk, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir William Boleyn est né en 1451, à Blickling, Norfolk, Angleterre, son père, Sir Geoffrey Boleyn II, avait 45 ans et sa mère, Anne Elizabeth Hoo, avait 4 ans. Il a épousé Lady Margaret Butler en 1475, à Blickling, Norfolk, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 8 fils et 5 filles. En 1500, à l’âge de 49 ans, sa profession de son indiquée est high sheriff of norfolk and suffolk à Angleterre. Il est décédé le 10 octobre 1505, à Hever, Kent, Angleterre, à l’âge de 54 ans, et a été enterré à Norwich Cathedral, Norwich, Norfolk, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir William Boleyn 1451 in Blickling, Norfolk, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Geoffrey Boleyn II 45 und seine Mutter Anne Elizabeth Hoo 4. Er hat 1475 in Blickling, Norfolk, England Lady Margaret Butler geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 8 Söhne und 5 Töchter. 1500, als er 49 Jahre alt war, war sein Beruf als high sheriff of norfolk and suffolk in England aufgeführt. Er starb am 10. Oktober 1505 im Alter von 54 Jahren in Hever, Kent, England und wurde in Norwich Cathedral, Norwich, Norfolk, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir William Boleyn è nato il nel 1451 nel Blickling, Norfolk, England, il suo padre, Sir Geoffrey Boleyn II, aveva 45 anni e il suo madre, Anne Elizabeth Hoo, aveva 4 anni. Lui sposato Lady Margaret Butler nel 1475, nel Blickling, Norfolk, England. Erano genitori di almeno 8 figli e 5 figlie. Nel 1500, all'età di 49 anni, la sua occupazione è indicata come high sheriff of norfolk and suffolk nel England. Morì il 10 ottobre 1505, nel Hever, Kent, England, all'età di 54 anni, e fu sepolto a Norwich Cathedral, Norwich, Norfolk, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir William Boleynが1451年にイギリスノーフォルクブリックリングで生まれた時，父Sir Geoffrey Boleyn IIは45歳，母Anne Elizabeth Hooは4歳であった。1475年にイギリスノーフォルクブリックリングでLady Margaret Butlerと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも8人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。1500年，49歳の時，イギリスでの職業はhigh sheriff of norfolk and suffolkと記録されている。彼は1505年10月10日にイギリスケントヘバーで54歳で死去し，イギリスノーフォルクノーウィチノーウィチ カスエドラルにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir William Boleyn(이)가 1451년 영국 노르폴크 블릭링에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Geoffrey Boleyn II(은)는 45세였고, 그의 어머니 Anne Elizabeth Hoo(은)는 4세였다. 그는 1475년 영국 노르폴크 블릭링에서 Lady Margaret Butler(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여덟 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 1500년, 49세의 나이로 그의 직업은 영국에서 high sheriff of norfolk and suffolk이었다. 그는 1505년 10월 10일 영국 켄트 헤버에서 54세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 노르폴크 노위치 노위치 캐테드럴에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir William Boleyn nasceu em 1451, em Blickling, Norfolk, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Geoffrey Boleyn II, tinha 45 anos e sua mãe, Anne Elizabeth Hoo, tinha 4 anos. Ele casou-se com Lady Margaret Butler em 1475, em Blickling, Norfolk, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 8 filhos e 5 filhas. Em 1500, com 49 anos, sua profissão aparece como high sheriff of norfolk and suffolk em Inglaterra. Ele faleceu em 10 de outubro de 1505, em Hever, Kent, Inglaterra, com 54 anos, e foi sepultado em Norwich Cathedral, Norwich, Norfolk, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir William Boleyn родился в 1451 г. в местности бликклинг, норфолк, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir Geoffrey Boleyn II было 45 лет, а матери, которую звали Anne Elizabeth Hoo, 4. Он женился на женщине по имени Lady Margaret Butler в 1475 г. в местности бликклинг, норфолк, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 8 сыновей и 5 дочерей. В 1500 году, в возрасте 49 лет,  он работал по профессии high sheriff of norfolk and suffolk в местности Англия. Он умер 10 октября 1505 г. в местности хивир, кэнт, Англия в возрасте 54 лет и был похоронен в местности норвич кэтедраль, норвич, норфолк, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir William Boleyn nació en 1451, en Blickling, Norfolk, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir Geoffrey Boleyn II, tenía 45 años y su mamá, Anne Elizabeth Hoo, tenía 4 años. Se casó con Lady Margaret Butler en 1475, en Blickling, Norfolk, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 8 hijos y 5 hijas. En 1500, a la edad de 49 años, su ocupación registrada era high sheriff of norfolk and suffolk en Inglaterra. Murió el 10 de octubre de 1505, en Hever, Kent, Inglaterra, a la edad de 54 años, y fue sepultado en Norwich Cathedral, Norwich, Norfolk, Inglaterra.
